question.text: SEBI has mandated that stockbrokers maintain designated client bank accounts titled:

answer.text: Name of Stock Broker - Client Account, now categorized as USCNBA and DSCNBA
Name of Stock Broker - Trading Account
Name of Stock Broker - Settlement Account
Name of Stock Broker - Personal Account

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Client bank accounts are now split into USCNBA (for receiving client funds) and DSCNBA (for paying clients). **The Trap:** The settlement account is a separate category - for settlement purposes only, titled 'Name of Stock Broker - Settlement Account'. **Cross-Exam Context:** Account nomenclature changes are testable regulatory updates. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** USCNBA receives funds from clients; DSCNBA pays out to clients - one-way flow in each.
